name: ethGetEthernetPortInfos
title: ethGetEthernetPortInfos
description: Retrieves port related information of all connected network-based Ethernet devices.
You must provide an array of ethernetPortInfo elements of sufficient size for all available hardware ports.

parameters.name: portInfos
parameters.description: Array of type <ethernetPortInfo>, which contains the retrieved hardware info as a struct with the following members: char PortName[32] char NetworkName[32] char SegmentName[32] uint32_t IsPhysical

return: Number of valid ethernetPortInfo elements (0 in case of any error).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
